recent_projects.name: mayatk
recent_projects.summary: *mayatk is a collection of utility functions and helper classes for Autodesk Maya, providing convenience wrappers and common workflow patterns for Maya scripting.*
recent_projects.author: Ryan Simpson

recent_projects.name: ndfilters
recent_projects.summary: Similar to the filters in `scipy.ndimage` but accelerated using Numba

recent_projects.name: uitk
recent_projects.summary: UITK is dynamic UI loader designed to manage multiple UI from one central switchboard.  Leverages naming convention to dynamically load UI files, register custom widgets, auto connect slots, set styles, restore and sync states, etc.
recent_projects.author: Ryan Simpson

recent_projects.name: pythontk
recent_projects.summary: *A collection of Python utility functions for file operations, text processing, and basic image/video manipulation. Provides helper classes and convenience functions for common programming tasks.*
recent_projects.author: Ryan Simpson

recent_projects.name: polli-typus
recent_projects.summary: Taxonomic types, projections and async taxonomy services for Polli-Labs.

recent_projects.name: twevals
recent_projects.summary: A lightweight, code-first evaluation framework for testing AI agents and LLM applications
recent_projects.author: Twevals Team

recent_projects.name: ReverseBox
recent_projects.summary: A set of functions useful in reverse engineering.
recent_projects.author: Bartlomiej Duda

recent_no_license_projects.name: mayatk
